name: Pittsburgh Steelers' Steak
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 inch-thick well-trimmed steaks (lean Porterhouse, T-bone or filet mignon)
1/4 cup shredded Parmesan cheese, plus additional for sprinkling
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from steaks.
2. Marinate steaks in Italian salad dressing overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
4. In a food processor bowl, combine shredded mozzarella, Swiss and Parmesan cheeses.
5. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet; add bread cubes and toss until browned.
6. Sprinkle additional Parmesan on the bread cubes.
7. Transfer three-fourths of the browned bread cubes to the food processor with the cheese mixture. Pulse twice only. Remove from the food processor.
8. Drain marinade from steaks and place them on wax paper. Discard the marinade.
9. Press a handful of the cheese mixture carefully onto each steak.
10. Place steaks in a baking dish, leaving plenty of room around each steak.
11. Bake 20 minutes for medium, 25 minutes for medium-well.
